inputs.label: Process Mean
inputs.businessContext: The arithmetic mean of the process measurements from the capability study.

inputs.label: Standard Deviation
inputs.businessContext: The standard deviation (overall or within) of the process. Use long-term for Pp/Ppk; short-term for Cp/Cpk.

inputs.label: Upper Specification Limit (USL)
inputs.businessContext: The upper tolerance boundary; parts above this are defective.

inputs.label: Lower Specification Limit (LSL)
inputs.businessContext: The lower tolerance boundary; parts below this are defective.
